aggregate_brief: Today's standouts: Clean Spark — 94th-percentile of 5-yr range — historically high; Coal — 7th-percentile of 5-yr range — historically low; GB Power — 92th-percentile of 5-yr range — historically high.

news.geopolitics_summary: Iran blocks Strait of Hormuz security mission; EU-China trade tensions persist; Ireland chairs critical EU ETS reform negotiations.

themes.headline: Ireland leads EU ETS reform amid pressure to weaken or protect scheme
themes.why_it_matters: EU ETS reform outcome directly sets EUA floor/ceiling and industrial competitiveness. Weakening scheme bearish-carbon; tightening bullish-carbon. Shapes EU power merit order via carbon cost pass-through into DA/Cal+1 spreads.

themes.headline: Germany joins push to delay EU methane emissions rules implementation
themes.why_it_matters: Delay of methane rules reduces regulatory pressure on EU gas supply cost and upstream capex disincentives. Bearish for carbon and gas price floors; supportive of gas-fired power relative to renewables in merit order.

themes.headline: Iran rejects Macron's Strait of Hormuz maritime security mission plan
themes.why_it_matters: Continued Hormuz tension elevates LNG shipping risk and insurance costs from Middle East to EU. Supports Brent/crude and indirect TTF via LNG arb compression. Bullish for EU power if gas supply tightens and coal/renewables displace gas.

themes.headline: Record heat wave across France drives 1,000 deaths and load pressure
themes.why_it_matters: Extreme heat boosts AC demand and cooling load across France/EU intraday. Peak demand surge bullish for DA power prices and EUA via thermal dispatch; may also constrain nuclear output if cooling-water temperatures near limits.

themes.headline: UAE withdrawal from OPEC+ reduces cartel crude production share and leverage
themes.why_it_matters: OPEC+ fragmentation and weaker output coordination reduce Brent support; lower crude prices indirectly ease global energy cost inflation, reducing LNG and TTF scarcity premium. Bearish for power if gas arb improves.

watchlist: EU ETS reform vote/decision (Ireland presidency H2 2026) — cardinal for EUA floor and power merit order.
Germany methane rules delay formal EU vote or withdrawal — monitors regulatory unwind risk on gas supply costs.
Strait of Hormuz security escalation or maritime incident — LNG shipping cost and availability shock.
France nuclear cooling-water stress during sustained heat — constrains supply, bullish peak power prices.
